testcase.name: test_duplicate_activation_blocked

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'already activated' in 'invalid or expired activation link' + where 'invalid or expired activation link' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfc23d5b7dfb0>() + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfc23d5b7dfb0> = 'Invalid or expired activation link'.lower + where 'Invalid or expired activation link' = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfc23d5c01a80>('detail', '') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfc23d5c01a80> = {'detail': 'Invalid or expired activation link'}.get + where {'detail': 'Invalid or expired activation link'} = json() + where json = <Response [400]>.json

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_affiliate_qualification_activation_v303.py:462: in test_duplicate_activation_blocked assert "already activated" in response.json().get("detail", "").lower() E AssertionError: assert 'already activated' in 'invalid or expired activation link' E + where 'invalid or expired activation link' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfc23d5b7dfb0>() E + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfc23d5b7dfb0> = 'Invalid or expired activation link'.lower E + where 'Invalid or expired activation link' = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfc23d5c01a80>('detail', '') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfc23d5c01a80> = {'detail': 'Invalid or expired activation link'}.get E + where {'detail': 'Invalid or expired activation link'} = json() E + where json = <Response [400]>.json

testcase.name: test_mark_whatsapp_sent
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_affiliate_qualification_activation_v303.py:634: in test_mark_whatsapp_sent app = next((a for a in apps if a["id"] == app_id), None) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ backend/tests/test_affiliate_qualification_activation_v303.py:634: in <genexpr> app = next((a for a in apps if a["id"] == app_id), None) ^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'id'
